metadata.title: Roni HaTzabai | Professional Painting & Spackling in Modi'in
metadata.description: Roni HaTzabai — 20 years of professional painting, spackling, and moisture repair services in Modi'in and the Shfela region. Free estimates!
metadata.keywords: painter Modi'in, spackling, apartment painting, moisture repair, office painting, Roni HaTzabai, painting services Israel

services.sectionSubtitle: A wide range of painting and spackling services at the highest level

emptyApartment.title: Empty Apartment Painting
emptyApartment.description: Professional painting of empty apartments with a special discount of up to 30%. Perfect results guaranteed without worrying about furniture.

occupiedApartment.title: Occupied Apartment Painting
occupiedApartment.description: Full coverage of furniture with protective nylon. Floor protection included. Thorough cleanup upon completion. You keep living — we handle everything.

moisture.title: Moisture & Mold Repair
moisture.description: Professional treatment of moisture damage and mold, including plaster repairs. Using specialized anti-mold materials and dedicated paints.

offices.title: Office Painting
offices.description: Professional office painting without disrupting daily operations. After-hours painting available by prior arrangement.

stairwells.title: Stairwells & Common Areas
stairwells.description: Painting stairwells and shared spaces. Clean, organized work with impressive results.

spackle.title: American Spackle
spackle.description: Wall smoothing with American spackle for a flawless, smooth finish. The result: walls as smooth as glass.

whatIncludes.sectionSubtitle: A professional, organized process from start to finish — this is how we work
whatIncludes.step1Desc: Covering all furniture with protective nylon for maximum protection. We treat your furniture as if it were our own.
whatIncludes.step2Desc: Covering floors with cardboard rolls or special mats to prevent any dirt or damage.
whatIncludes.step3Desc: Opening cracks and scraping peeling paint as needed — proper surface preparation is the foundation for perfect work.
whatIncludes.step4Desc: Applying a Bondroll primer coat to create a strong, durable base that ensures perfect paint adhesion.
whatIncludes.step5Desc: Professional crack treatment using special crack bandages — preventing the problem from recurring.
whatIncludes.step6Desc: Filling holes and spackle repairs. Every small imperfection receives precise treatment.
whatIncludes.step7Desc: Wall smoothing with American spackle upon client request — for an exceptionally smooth, perfect result.
whatIncludes.step8Desc: Sanding walls as needed and preparing the surface for paint. A critical step for professional results.
whatIncludes.step9Desc: Painting ceilings and walls with premium acrylic paint, in your chosen color, with two coats for perfect, uniform coverage.
whatIncludes.step10Desc: Thorough cleanup upon completion. You return to a clean, organized, and refreshed home.

moistureSection.sectionSubtitle: Professional, thorough solutions for moisture and mold problems in bathrooms and throughout the home
moistureSection.step1: Mold treatment using specialized, dedicated materials
moistureSection.step5: Ceiling and wall painting with premium anti-mold paint

advantages.item1Desc: Professional expertise accumulated over two decades of fieldwork
advantages.item2Desc: Professional Israeli team, clear communication, and complete reliability
advantages.item3Desc: We arrive quickly, work efficiently, and finish on time
advantages.item4Desc: Using only the highest quality paints and materials available on the market
advantages.item5Desc: Honest, fair prices for every budget — no surprises
advantages.item6Desc: Special discount of up to 30% for painting empty apartments

about.heroSubtitle: 20 years of professionalism, reliability, and passion for paint
about.storyP1: Roni HaTzabai is a family business with 20 years of experience in the painting and spackling industry. We specialize in painting apartments, offices, stairwells, and repairing moisture and mold damage.
about.storyP2: We believe every wall tells a story, and every coat of paint is an opportunity to renew and refresh your home. We work only with the highest quality materials available on the market, because we never compromise on quality.
about.storyP3: Our team is an Israeli crew — professional, reliable, and communicative. When you choose Roni HaTzabai, you choose peace of mind.
about.value1Desc: Every project receives the full attention and skill we've built over two decades
about.value2Desc: What we promise — we deliver. Always.
about.value3Desc: We leave your apartment cleaner than we found it
about.value4Desc: Clear, detailed quotes with no surprises and no hidden costs
